steps.name: Fetch Merchant Details
steps.description: To check the details of a specific merchant under a partner

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Merchant ID of the merchant.

resParams.name: partnerId
resParams.description: The Partner ID of the partner with whom the merchant is affiliated.

resParams.name: currencyCode
resParams.description: Three-digit ISO currency code, representing the supported currency for the merchant. Can be any one of the following: ‘208’ | ‘978’ | ‘752’.

resParams.name: merchantName
resParams.description: Name of the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantLanguage
resParams.description: Preferred language selected by the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantLogoUrl
resParams.description: Merchant logo URL.

resParams.name: email
resParams.description: Email address of the merchant.

resParams.name: companyId
resParams.description: Company ID of the merchant.

resParams.name: countryCode
resParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the primary location of the merchant.

resParams.name: mccCode
resParams.description: Merchant Category Code (MCC) of the merchant.

resParams.name: address
resParams.description: Physical address of the merchant.

resParams.name: careOf
resParams.description: Name of the addressee that is accepting the correspondence for the intended recipient.

resParams.name: addressLine1
resParams.description: Address of the merchant.

resParams.name: addressLine2
resParams.description: Address of the merchant.

resParams.name: addressLine3
resParams.description: Address of the merchant.

resParams.name: city
resParams.description: City where the merchant is located.

resParams.name: countryCode
resParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the location of the merchant.

resParams.name: postalCode
resParams.description: Postal code of the merchant.

resParams.name: createdAt
resParams.description: Timestamp at which the merchant was created.

resParams.name: totalNumberOfTransaction
resParams.description: Total number of transactions performed by the merchant.

resParams.name: totalAmountOfTransaction
resParams.description: Denotes the total monetary value of all transactions performed by the merchant.

resParams.name: lastTransactionAt
resParams.description: Timestamp of the last transaction in ISO 8601 format represented as 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ'.

resParams.name: phoneNumber
resParams.description: Phone number of the merchant.

resParams.name: acquirerMID
resParams.description: Denotes the Acquirer MID for onboarding merchants through payment institution partners(PF or Acquirer).

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
